## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Vercel Preview checked
- [ ] Mobile behavior checked when applicable

## Security and data

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, exports, or private user data are included
- [ ] User-owned queries remain scoped to the authenticated profile
- [ ] Database changes are backward-compatible or include a reviewed migration
- [ ] Error messages and logs avoid sensitive information

## Screenshots

Add before-and-after screenshots for visible changes, or write “Not applicable.”
